feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.content: And also subjectively, what was the the scariest film you've ever personally experienced?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I rode an ebike for the first time today and I hated it. I fell off once when I …
entry.content: I rode an ebike for the first time today and I hated it. I fell off once when I tried to stop before a curb but accidentally stepped on the pedal just lightly and the bike accelerated, causing me to almost faceplant. Every time I pushed the throttle it felt like the bike was moving ahead fast while my body was still behind, no build up, causing me to also nearly fall back. I know I sound like a pussy but I'm small person. I just got my motorcycle permit because I want to replace my car with a 15

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: MENCIA CAPTURED
entry.content: BREAKING: MENCIA CAPTURED Carlos Mencia has just been captured by the U.S. Government and is facing at least a decade in federal prison. Mencia is accused of serious crimes relating directly to his television, film, and stage entertainment career.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'm convinced no one played Skyward Sword. The triforce glows on Link's hand for…
entry.content: I'm convinced no one played Skyward Sword. The triforce glows on Link's hand for each sacred flame he imbues the master sword with. Then later on then that, he actually obtains every piece of the triforce too. But before he does, it's glowing on his hand.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I played with the bigger guild tonight. It was fun. It's only in hindsight that …
entry.content: I played with the bigger guild tonight. It was fun. It's only in hindsight that I realized I was recruited by that very same guild because the guild leader joined my guild to "claim keeps" but look where I am, in their guild. I can only make allies with them. I have to stay with my guild which I have built with my own hands. I'm going to play with the bigger guild just enough to get into the officer chat and then I'll be able to coordinate with them. Damn are they thicc though

entry.content: >Family Dynamic edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Every time I upgrade to Max for a month or two there's some shit going on, the l…
entry.content: Every time I upgrade to Max for a month or two there's some shit going on, the limits are unreliable and it feels like they're just patching every thing with flextape You're better off just maxxing out your weekly and doing whatever you want to do because they might just roll you back at unfortunate timings, it's not about the limit it's having control of when you spend that limit and when you have the free time to do so. They're very gracious in giving you more limit after they fuck up and that

entry.title: /news/ News: Dazed Biden gets left behind at Obama Center opening: ‘Where’s my granddaughter’
entry.content: https://nypost.com/2026/06/18/us-ne ws/biden-gets-left-behind-at-obama- center-opening-wheres-my-granddaugh ter/ They just left him there. Former President Joe Biden was awkwardly left lingering by himself on stage at the grand opening of the Barack Obama Presidential Center in Chicago, tepidly waving at the crowd after the ceremony ended. A gleeful Obama had waltzed off the stage to the music, followed by a smiling former first lady Jill Biden, while the 46th president stood there seemingly daz

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: shipping rant x deltarune
entry.content: > "ship" scene > obvious fake out > forced by player through violence > neither character has romantic intentions > one is actually terrified > glorified as genuine romance Fandom shippers are genuinely delusional and unstable. They will ignore or invent any subtext, character trait, or story beat to keep their fantasy alive. They deserve a court ordered dopamine detox and probably some relationship counselling. When called out enough they backtrack to "It's my head canon! It's my theory!" becau

entry.title: /b/ Random: Launching on /b/ cuz Product Hunt suuuuuucks Join us at: deskmate.online or: des…
entry.content: Launching on /b/ cuz Product Hunt suuuuuucks Join us at: deskmate.online or: deskmate.jp.net We’re building fully customizable desktop companions: characters that will live on your screen, react to your workflow, and help with what you’re doing. Remember ウカガカ (Ukagaka)? That’s like that but 1000x better. Right now we’re trying to see what happens when your desktop gets a little more personality. Are we summoning the shoggoth? Maybe. Ask us anything.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The Matrix
entry.content: This movie is fucking fascinating to me. It's clearly a totally pozzed leftist power fantasy and total plagiarist collage of 80's and 90's Japanese sci-fi anime and manga. But inadverntatley it completely birthed conspiracy culture due to the singular power of its iconography (a total and utter cosmic fluke given the would-be trannies who "made" it, or ripped it off from some straight white male's script) and is directly responsible for the alt-right, anti-woke and groypers/schizos.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Mortal Kombat II (2026)
entry.content: Just watched this as a MK casual. Only read the wiki for the first one. Honestly not bad for what amounts to a B-flick. The Scorpion vs. Shadow fight was sick and Karl Urban did great as Johnny Cage. Shao Khan didn't really feel like a world-ending threat without the immortality hack, though. Also wish we got to see Raiden fuck some people up. Liu Kang vs. Kung Lao & Shao Khan was also pretty sweet. On the other hand, some of the fights felt kind of lame or weakly choreographed. For example, Jax

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: What are we going to do with our image collections from 4chan? I have endless fo…
entry.content: What are we going to do with our image collections from 4chan? I have endless folders within folders of shit saved here from over the last 16 years. Do you have a plan for your image folders? How would one go about making money from their image collections? I'm curious to try and figure out something to do. My stomach hurts so bad from eating breakfast. It's not agreeing with me at all. I feel like I'm going to have some very bad diarrhea today. How's everyone else doing?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: SCREENS IN THE DARK ARE PROBABLY FUCKING US UP REALLY BAD
entry.content: Try it out yourself I just noticed this: Step 1: Look at screen in the dark. I was on my lowest brightness dark mode orange light phone Step 2: Turn away from the screen and close your eyes. Ensure contrast by cupping your eyes with your hands Result: your eyes/vision will begin to flicker and flash like a motherfucker despite there being no light present I am also reminded that LED lights flicker and flash a shitton and cause eye degradation and stress. So dark mode means SHIT when it comes to

entry.content: i am now obsessed with rabbits, i think they are the best pet even better than dogs. i want rabbits so much but i know that since i live alone i can not properly care for them because i will be gone 8 hours a day working and even have to travlel sometimes and it would be bad to leave them alone that long

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The previous thread has died >>109052535 since I haven't managed to reply in tim…
entry.content: The previous thread has died >>109052535 since I haven't managed to reply in time. Reposting from the previous OP: ==== A short preamble. I got interested in a 2009 game Solium Infernum made entirely in Adobe Director. To better understand its code and potentially to mod its graphic assets, I spent some time searching for decompilers, and found two great tools: - https://github.com/ProjectorRays/Pr ojectorRays/releases which produces readable .dir files from protected Director .cxt format which

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If there ain't gonna be whites on the streets, I'm gonna laugh at you
entry.content: I'll not align with people who hate me even after saying I wanted to be white. The toll you're going to pay will be your extermination through interbreeding and mass immigration. Also, if I'm not white, why should I care about you? I hope that all of your kind disappear. I hate you more than niggers. They think our eugenist plan is just mordernation. Blondes, blue eyes, gingers, brown hair, white skin, and green eyes will all disappear. You deserve if for not making me be born white.
